ListL2Policy.action: Fixed value for this API is ListL2Policy
ListL2Policy.instanceId: Short ID of the PFS instance corresponding to the policyId
ListL2Policy.maxKeys: Number of results to return in this request, default is 20
ListL2Policy.marker: The nextMarker value returned from the previous response, used for paginated traversal of all tasks; the next request will resume from this marker
